MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Shelley S. Buchanan, Esq. 566-3526 for pltf & opposing party; M. D. Moye, Esq. 777-3200 for deft & moving party Oxo Chemie, Inc.
RULING: The Court announced a revised tentative ruling as follows: The first, second, third & fourth causes of action are all granted; the fifth and sixth causes of action remain the same (granted).
Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Each to submit proposed orders w/ 3 page letters by Tuesday, 01/08.
